option_line: imoinuUmbra_macarioHubSelA:"I'm just a merc. He was extremely assertive about giving me a job."
original: I'm just a merc. He was extremely assertive about giving me a job.
translated: Je ne suis qu'un mercenaire. Il a été extrêmement insistant pour me confier un travail.

option_line: imoinuUmbra_macarioHubSelD:"I'm a secret Hegemony agent working to undermine the Diktat." (lie)
original: I'm a secret Hegemony agent working to undermine the Diktat." (lie)
translated: Je suis un agent secret de l'Hégémonie travaillant à saper le Diktat." (mensonge)

option_line: imoinuUmbra_macarioHubSelF:"I am of the Luddic faith and I'm taking them down from the inside." (lie)
original: I am of the Luddic faith and I'm taking them down from the inside." (lie)
translated: Je suis de la foi luddique et je les sabote de l'intérieur." (mensonge)

option_line: imoinuUmbra_macarioHubSelG:"I am of the Luddic faith and I'm taking them down from the inside."
original: I am of the Luddic faith and I'm taking them down from the inside.
translated: Je suis de la foi luddique et je les sabote de l'intérieur.

option_line: imoinuUmbra_macarioHubSelH:"I'm Persean League fleet intelligence. My real name is 'Siyavong'." (lie)
original: I'm Persean League fleet intelligence. My real name is 'Siyavong'." (lie)
translated: Renseignements de la flotte de la Ligue Perséane. Mon vrai nom est 'Siyavong'." (mensonge)

original: "Sure. Okay." She crosses her arms and gives you an incredulous look.
translated: "Bien sûr. D'accord." Elle croise les bras et vous lance un regard incrédule.

original: "No you're not." Imoinu crosses her arms. "You're as much a liar as Macario."
translated: "Non, vous ne l'êtes pas." Imoinu croise les bras. "Vous êtes aussi menteur que Macario."

option_line: imoinuKato_sayDardan:"I met Dardan. Is he your brother?"
original: I met Dardan. Is he your brother?
translated: J'ai rencontré Dardan. C'est votre frère ?

option_line: imoinuKato_saySalute:"I salute your dedication. It is a just cause."
original: I salute your dedication. It is a just cause.
translated: Je salue votre dévouement. C'est une juste cause.

option_line: imoinuKato_sayDoomed:"It seems a doomed cause. Don't you want to go home?"
original: It seems a doomed cause. Don't you want to go home?
translated: Cela semble être une cause perdue. Vous ne voulez pas rentrer chez vous ?
